mapper.select: select count(1) > 0 from users where lower(username) = lower(#{username})
select count(1) > 0 from users where lower(email) = lower(#{email})
select * from users where lower(username) = lower(#{principal}) or lower(email) = lower(#{principal}) limit 1
mapper.update: update users set username = #{username}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, avatar = #{avatar}, level = #{level}, total_listening = #{totalListening}, mastered_count = #{masteredCount}, current_streak = #{currentStreak}, longest_streak = #{longestStreak}, join_date = #{joinDate}, last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
